arts.ttl: Arsenal confident of landing £10m-rated ace after opening talks to sign him
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing the highly-rated Rosenborg midfielder Sverre Nypan. According to TBR Football, Arsenal are now best placed to secure his signature, and they are leading Manchester United in the race to sign the player. arts.ttl: ‘Main obstacle’ to Arsenal exit explained – Talks ongoing, Gunners not playing ball
arts.sum: Flamengo remain in talks with Arsenal midfielder Jorginho to try and find an agreement for the January transfer window. That’s according to GE Global, who report that the ‘main obstacle’ for the transfer is money. The player and the Brazilian club are yet to find common ground on that front. arts.ttl: Arsenal avoid nightmare Champions League transfer scenario after stunning Mikel Arteta comeback
arts.sum: That does mean that if Arsenal qualify then they can rely on any new signings made this month but after an impressive comeback in the competition, they don't have to be too worried about not having extra reinforcements for the last two matches. Arsenal are currently third in the group phase with two matches left to play.
